Acme About Contact

Find a local plumber, fast

This fixture's hero background-image lives in an external stylesheet — invisible to the static parser, recovered by the rendered fetch's getComputedStyle pass. The body is intentionally rich enough that the escalation heuristic does NOT fire on thin-body grounds; force-rendered is the exercise path for the computed background-image extraction.

Why Acme

  • Vetted local trades
  • Same-day availability
  • Transparent pricing
